titleStmt.title: SII 18.257: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 257. (B.K. No. 107 of 1932-33.) HIRĒLIṄGADAHAḶḶI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Hero-stone near the temple of Kalamēśvara in S. No. 68.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 10th year of the reign of Rāmachandradēva, Pramāthi, Phālguṇa ba. 5, Monday. The details are irregular. The tithi corresponds to A.D. 1280, February 5. The week-day however was Thursday.

It records the death of Mallaya-Nāyaka, called the child (s11is11u) of the Eighteen Samayas (Hadineṇṭu Samaya) in a fight in the presence of the assembly of the pṛithvīnāḍu in Nagarakhaṇḍa. Tiḷuvaḷḷi is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷapravuḍhapra
tāpacakravartti śrīvīrarāmacaṁdradēvarāya rājyōdayada ha
teneya pramāthisaṁvatsarada phālguṇa bahuḷa 5 sōmavāradaṁdu
śrīmatu nagarakhaṁḍanāḍoḷage prithvīnāḍu neradu tiḷuvaḷḷiya kōṭe
seya koṁḍu taḷtiṟidu maṟedu suralōkaprāptanāda hadineṁṭṭu
samayada sisu yālūra mallayanāyka maṁgaḷa mahaśrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 18.257 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
